args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

result.preview: "Execution failed with exit code 1\nSyntaxError: unterminated string literal (detected at line 31)"

args.code:
import json, re
import pandas as pd

# load businesses accepting credit cards with descriptions
path = var_call_SwsaUxu932BYhrHWgt4ZoBOC
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    biz = json.load(f)

# parse categories from description: text after 'services in' or 'categories of'
rows=[]
for r in biz:
    bid=r.get('business_id')
    desc=r.get('description') or ''
    desc_lower=desc.lower()
    cats=None
    m=re.search(r"services in (.+?)\.?$", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    if m:
        cats=m.group(1)
    else:
        m=re.search(r"categories of (.+?)\.?$", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        if m:
            cats=m.group(1)
    if cats is None:
        continue
    # strip leading filler
    cats=cats.strip()
    cats=re.sub(r"^the categories of\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats=re.sub(r"^categories of\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats=re.sub(r"^in the categories of\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats=re.sub(r"^the category of\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats=cats.strip("'\"")
    # split by comma and 'and'
    parts=[p.strip() for p in re.split(r",|\band\b", cats) if p.strip()]
    for p in parts:
        # normalize whitespace
        p=re.sub(r"\s+", " ", p)
        rows.append({'business_id':bid,'category':p})

cat_df=pd.DataFrame(rows).drop_duplicates()

# counts per category
counts=cat_df.groupby('category')['business_id'].nunique().reset_index(name='business_count')
if counts.empty:
    out={'error':'No categories parsed from descriptions.'}
    print('__RESULT__:')
    print(json.dumps(out))
    raise SystemExit

max_count=counts['business_count'].max()
leaders=counts[counts['business_count']==max_count].sort_values('category')
leader_cat=leaders.iloc[0]['category']

# map business_id -> business_ref
cat_biz=set(cat_df[cat_df['category']==leader_cat]['business_id'].unique().tolist())
leader_refs=[('businessref_'+b.split('_',1)[1]) for b in cat_biz]

rev_df=pd.DataFrame(var_call_tmpx3xh8hFLHPhGcuMM93X9A)
rev_df['avg_rating']=rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)
leader_avg=rev_df[rev_df['business_ref'].isin(leader_refs)]['avg_rating'].mean()

result={'category':leader_cat,'business_count':int(max_count),'average_rating':None if pd.isna(leader_avg) else float(leader_avg)}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

var_call_g7uR6hXwaiwD7DSSyHZLDi9S.name: Steps to Learning Montessori Preschool
var_call_g7uR6hXwaiwD7DSSyHZLDi9S.description: Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools.

import pandas as pd

with open(path, 'r') as f:
    biz = json.load(f)

rows = []
for r in biz:
    bid = r.get('business_id')
    desc = r.get('description') or ''
    cats = None
    m = re.search(r"services in (.+?)\\.?$", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    if m:
        cats = m.group(1)
    else:
        m = re.search(r"categories of (.+?)\\.?$", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        if m:
            cats = m.group(1)
    if cats is None:
        continue

    cats = cats.strip()
    cats = re.sub(r"^the categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^in the categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^the category of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = cats.strip("'\"")

    parts = [p.strip() for p in re.split(r",|\\band\\b", cats) if p.strip()]
    for p in parts:
        p = re.sub(r"\\s+", " ", p)
        rows.append({'business_id': bid, 'category': p})

cat_df = pd.DataFrame(rows).drop_duplicates()
counts = cat_df.groupby('category')['business_id'].nunique().reset_index(name='business_count')

if counts.empty:
    out = {'error': 'No categories parsed from descriptions.'}
    print('__RESULT__:')
    print(json.dumps(out))
    raise SystemExit

max_count = int(counts['business_count'].max())
leaders = counts[counts['business_count'] == max_count].sort_values('category')

cat_biz = set(cat_df[cat_df['category'] == leader_cat]['business_id'].unique().tolist())

leader_avg = rev_df[rev_df['business_ref'].isin(leader_refs)]['avg_rating'].mean()

result = {
    'category': leader_cat,
    'business_count': max_count,
    'average_rating': None if pd.isna(leader_avg) else float(leader_avg)
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

    cats = re.sub(r"^categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^in the categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^the category of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = cats.strip("'" + '"')

    parts = [p.strip() for p in re.split(r",|\\band\\b", cats) if p.strip()]
    for p in parts:
        p = re.sub(r"\\s+", " ", p)
        rows.append({'business_id': bid, 'category': p})

cat_df = pd.DataFrame(rows).drop_duplicates()
counts = cat_df.groupby('category')['business_id'].nunique().reset_index(name='business_count')

if counts.empty:
    out = {'error': 'No categories parsed from descriptions.'}
    print('__RESULT__:')
    print(json.dumps(out))
    raise SystemExit

max_count = int(counts['business_count'].max())
leaders = counts[counts['business_count'] == max_count].sort_values('category')
leader_cat = leaders.iloc[0]['category']

cat_biz = set(cat_df[cat_df['category'] == leader_cat]['business_id'].unique().tolist())
leader_refs = [('businessref_' + b.split('_', 1)[1]) for b in cat_biz]

rev_df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_tmpx3xh8hFLHPhGcuMM93X9A)
rev_df['avg_rating'] = rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)
leader_avg = rev_df[rev_df['business_ref'].isin(leader_refs)]['avg_rating'].mean()

result = {
    'category': leader_cat,
    'business_count': max_count,
    'average_rating': None if pd.isna(leader_avg) else float(leader_avg)
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

val_args.code:
import json, re
import pandas as pd

path = var_call_SwsaUxu932BYhrHWgt4ZoBOC
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    biz = json.load(f)

rows = []
for r in biz:
    bid = r.get('business_id')
    desc = r.get('description') or ''
    cats = None
    m = re.search(r"services in (.+?)\\.?$", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    if m:
        cats = m.group(1)
    else:
        m = re.search(r"categories of (.+?)\\.?$", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        if m:
            cats = m.group(1)
    if cats is None:
        continue

    cats = cats.strip()
    cats = re.sub(r"^the categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^in the categories of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = re.sub(r"^the category of\\s+", "", cats, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    cats = cats.strip("'" + '"')

    parts = [p.strip() for p in re.split(r",|\\band\\b", cats) if p.strip()]
    for p in parts:
        p = re.sub(r"\\s+", " ", p)
        rows.append({'business_id': bid, 'category': p})

cat_df = pd.DataFrame(rows).drop_duplicates()
counts = cat_df.groupby('category')['business_id'].nunique().reset_index(name='business_count')

if counts.empty:
    out = {'error': 'No categories parsed from descriptions.'}
    print('__RESULT__:')
    print(json.dumps(out))
    raise SystemExit

max_count = int(counts['business_count'].max())
leaders = counts[counts['business_count'] == max_count].sort_values('category')
leader_cat = leaders.iloc[0]['category']

cat_biz = set(cat_df[cat_df['category'] == leader_cat]['business_id'].unique().tolist())
leader_refs = [('businessref_' + b.split('_', 1)[1]) for b in cat_biz]

rev_df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_tmpx3xh8hFLHPhGcuMM93X9A)
rev_df['avg_rating'] = rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)
leader_avg = rev_df[rev_df['business_ref'].isin(leader_refs)]['avg_rating'].mean()

result = {
    'category': leader_cat,
    'business_count': max_count,
    'average_rating': None if pd.isna(leader_avg) else float(leader_avg)
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))
